div.div: TEE/TPM은 optional hardening이다. 고위험 reveal은 PC와 스마트폰 partial decrypt가 모두 필요한 Threshold FHE로 승격한다.

div.div:
• Secure Gateway: supported secret plaintext is not sent to Agent/LLM
• Threshold FHE: one share alone cannot reveal
• TEE/TPM: optional hardening, not a required trust base

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 809px; margin-left: 582px;

div.div:
• PC fusion: plaintext appears on PC
• Phone fusion: plaintext stays on phone display
• Never send phone wrapping key or phone secret share to PC

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
